caption: A person's hands are shown mixing ingredients in a large silver bowl on a light-colored wooden surface. To the right of the bowl sit a white plate and a small red bowl, both containing a light-brown, granular mixture. The person uses their hands to stir and combine the contents of the silver bowl, with their movements creating a blur across the sequence. In the top-left frame, the hands are positioned at the top of the bowl; by the final frame, they are deeper in the mixture, actively churning the ingredients. Each frame features a blue and white cloudy banner in the upper-left corner containing the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" next to a small white logo. The background remains static, focusing on the tactile process of mixing the food materials.
